description: Slip-on sandals have never looked this good. This beige leather footwear from catwalk is versatile enough to go with everything: from jeans to ethnic wear to dresses. The leather panels with the cutouts make it perfect for everyday wear. Upper Straps on the forefoot and midfoot stitched together under a central design for a snug Fit Aggressive stitch detailing for added style Soft lining for added comfort Synthetic leather footbed in an ergonomic design for extra comfort Outsole TPR outsole with chunky heel Herringbone pattern on the forefoot Terraced grooves on the heel for better grip Sandal Care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight Use a branded leather conditioner and brush to restore shoe shine
